calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Christopher Jew for Petitioner, Bill Kong.

The court stated that it waives any notice issues arised from 2/11/2021 filing, waives any detailed schedules and intends to grant the petition with an adjustment of $800.00 and asked if Mr. Jew would like to be heard on this matter. Mr. Jew stated he submits on the court's ruling.

The accounting petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Persons Entitled To Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Bill Kong (Administrator).

The Court asks if there is anything else that can be done to track down and give notice to those who are potentially able to claim. Mr. Jew stated that other than continuing to call the folks that have not called back, he does not think there is anything else that can be done. Mr. Jew also stated that the Daughter of Ms. Ying refused to provide her mailing address, that he corresponded with the Daughter by e-mail and she indicated that she did not know Ms. Dan, and that they hired a company in 2015 to track down Heirs on the maternal side, but they were unable to find anyone. The Petition for Determination of Persons Entitled to Distribution is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Petition To Approve Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Bill Kong.

Mr. Jew requested a 60-day continuance stating that his Client had misplaced some bank statements, that he just received them, and that he was advised that one of the heirs just passed away and they need to look into it to see if someone is going to be appointed for that person. Status on close of estate is continued to August 20, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Jew was advised that if he is not in a position to file a petition for final distribution by August 14th, he is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Authorize And Instruct The Administrator (Probate Code Section 9611)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Jew for Bill Kong (Administrator)

The Court inquires if the Administrator can proceed without instructions from the Court, stating he is not sure if he is sufficiently informed to act. Mr. Jew responded, there are options to explore. The Court granted the Petition to Approve Status of Administration (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Instructions is Off Calendar without Prejudice.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
